sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11800" key="a)/pektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄπεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, lit. <sense id="n11800.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uncombed</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unshorn,</tr_> of sheep less than a year old, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μὴ σφάττειν πρόβατον ἄ. ἢ ἄτοκον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1125.tlg001:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Androt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0583.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philoch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
